member.summary: Loads the model from a database context.
member.param: A DbContext object to load the model from.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsInheritedFrom(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the type is inherited from another type specified by the specified full type name.
member.param: The type to check the inheritence for.
member.returns: true if is inherited from the type specified byt its full type name; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsInheritedFrom(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the type is inherited from another type.
member.param: The type to check the inheritence for.
member.returns: true if is inherited from the type; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsInheritedFromGeneric(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the type is inherited from generic type.
member.param: The type to check the inheritence for.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsSimpleType(System.Type)
member.summary: Checks if the type can be used in columns and conditions

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsComplexType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is complex type (marked by ComplexType attribute).
member.returns: true if the specified type is a complex type; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsGenericType(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is generic type.
member.returns: true if the specified type is a generic type; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsEnum(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is an enumeration.
member.returns: true if the specified type is a enumeration type; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsNullable(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is a nullable type.
member.returns: true if the specified type is a nullable type; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsAttributeDefined(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the attribute with specified name is defined for the property.
member.param: A PropertyInfo object which defines the property
member.returns: true if "attrName" attribute is defined for "pi" property; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.GetMappedProperties(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Reflection.PropertyInfo})
member.summary: Filters the list of properties (defined by source parameter) to return only those which does not have "NotMapped" attribute.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.TypeExtensions.IsEnumerable(System.Type)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified type is enumerable (supports interface.
member.returns: true if the specified type to check is enumerable; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader
member.summary: Retrieves DB metadata from a DbContext object and fills the structures of instance.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,NDjango.Admin.MetaData)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The DbContext to get metadata from.
The MetaData object to save metadata to.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContext,NDjango.Admin.MetaData,NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The DbContext to get metadata from.
The MetaData object to save metadata to.
The loader option. You can define here which model and/or properties should be skipped, what names the will have, what display formats to use and so on.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.GetEntityTypes
member.summary: Gets the entity types filtered acording to EntitFilters list defined in

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.ApplyEntityFilters(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType)
member.summary: Applies the entity filters.
member.param: An instance of that defines the entity.
member.returns: true if the entity passes the filters, false otherwise.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.GetEntityProperties(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType)
member.summary: Gets the entity properties filtered according to the PropertyFilters list defined in .
member.param: An instance of that represents the entity.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.ApplyPropertyFilters(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IProperty)
member.summary: Applies the property filters.
member.param: An instance of that represents the property.
member.returns: true if the property passes the filters, false otherwise.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.LoadFromDbContext
member.summary: Loads metadata from a DbContext object and stores them into a instance passed in the constructor

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.GetEntityId(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType)
member.summary: Gets the entity ID by .
member.param: An instance of that represents the entity.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.ProcessEntityType(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType)
member.summary: Processes one entity.
member.param: An instance of that represents the entity.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.ProcessNavigationProperty(NDjango.Admin.MetaEntity,Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType,Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.INavigation,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Processes the navigation property.
member.param: An instance of that represents the entity in DbContext.
Represents the default index of the processed attribute

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoader.CreateEntityAttribute(NDjango.Admin.MetaEntity,Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType,Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IProperty)
member.summary: Creates the entity attribute for a particular entity type and property.
member.param: The entity to which the new attribute will be added.
An instance of that represents the entity in the DbContext.
An instance of that represents the property in the model class.

member.summary: Represents exception class for

member.summary: Contains different options for

member.summary: Gets the list of entity filters

member.name: P:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.PropertyFilters
member.summary: Gets the list of property filters.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.AddFilter(System.Func{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Adds a filter, which will be used during model loading from

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.AddEntityFilter(System.Func{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IEntityType,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Adds an entity filter that will be used during the loading of the model from a

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.AddPropertyFilter(System.Func{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.IProperty,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Adds the property filter. that will be used during the loading of the model from a

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.Skip``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}}[])
member.summary: Adds an entity filter (if the list of property selectors is empty) or bunch of property filters that makes the model loader skip the specified entity or properties.
member.typeparam: The type of the model class the represent the entity which should be skipped (or some of its properties should be skipped).
member.param: The list of property selectors. Each selector defines a property that should be skipped during the metadata loading.

member.name: P:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.HidePrimaryKeys
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether we need to hide primary key fields in the data model.
member.value: true if the primary key fields must be hidden; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.SkipForeignKeys
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether we need to skip foreign key fields and don't include them into the data model.
member.value: true if the foreign key fields must be skipped; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.KeepDbSetDeclarationOrder
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether entities must keep order of DbSet declarations.

member.name: P:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.ModelCustomizer
member.summary: Gets the delegate that will be called at the end of metadata loading to customize loaded entities and attributes (properties).

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextMetaDataLoaderOptions.CustomizeModel(System.Action{NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.MetadataCustomizer})
member.summary: Sets the model customizer - an action that configures some entities and their properties in the loaded model.
member.param: The procedure that configures the metadata model

member.name: T:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.MetadataCustomizer
member.summary: Builds entity metadata.

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.MetadataCustomizer.GetEntityBuilder``1
member.summary: Gets the customizer for an entity by its type. This is a virtual method that can be overridden in descendants

member.name: M:NDjango.Admin.EntityFrameworkCore.MetadataCustomizer.Entity``1
member.summary: Gets the entity customizer by its type
